testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 1: Authentication URL Correctness
testcase.name: should always construct valid URLs from environment variables

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 1: Authentication URL Correctness
testcase.name: should always produce consistent URLs for the same inputs

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 1: Authentication URL Correctness
testcase.name: should handle various URL formats correctly

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 2: Environment Variable Configuration
testcase.name: should always validate environment configuration consistently

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 2: Environment Variable Configuration
testcase.name: should always prefer NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL over BACKEND_URL

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 2: Environment Variable Configuration
testcase.name: should always return a valid URL even with missing env vars

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 4: Authentication Response Handling
testcase.name: should always handle successful authentication responses correctly

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 4: Authentication Response Handling
testcase.name: should always throw appropriate errors for failed authentication

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 5: Error Handling and Messaging
testcase.name: should always create valid error objects

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 5: Error Handling and Messaging
testcase.name: should always return user-friendly error messages

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 5: Error Handling and Messaging
testcase.name: should always handle any error type gracefully

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Property 6: Development Logging
testcase.name: should log in development mode but not in production

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Additional Property: Email Validation
testcase.name: should consistently validate email formats

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Additional Property: Email Validation
testcase.name: should reject invalid email formats

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Additional Property: Password Validation
testcase.name: should consistently validate password strength

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Additional Property: Password Validation
testcase.name: should always return consistent error messages for weak passwords

testcase.classname: Property-Based Tests: Authentication Service › Additional Property: Credentials Validation
testcase.name: should consistently validate complete credentials
should return NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL when set
should return BACKEND_URL when NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is not set
should return default localhost URL when no env vars are set
should prefer NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL over BACKEND_URL
should return valid when all required env vars are set
should return error when NEXTAUTH_SECRET is missing
should return error when NEXTAUTH_SECRET is too short
should return error when NEXTAUTH_URL is missing
should return multiple errors when multiple configs are invalid
should construct URL with backend URL and endpoint
should handle backend URL with trailing slash
should handle endpoint without leading slash
should use default backend URL when not configured
should return correct login endpoint URL
should return correct user details endpoint URL
should successfully authenticate user with valid credentials
should throw validation error when email is missing
should throw validation error when password is missing
should throw credentials error on 401 response
should throw server error on 500 response
should throw server error when access_token is missing
should throw server error when user details fetch fails
should throw network error on fetch failure
should use correct authorization header for user details request
should create error with all properties
should create error without optional properties
should return friendly message for configuration error
should return friendly message for network error
should return friendly message for credentials error
should return friendly message for server error
should return original message for validation error
should handle AuthError correctly
should convert regular Error to AuthError
should handle unknown error types
should validate correct email addresses
should reject invalid email addresses
should validate strong passwords
should reject password that is too short
should reject password without uppercase letter
should reject password without lowercase letter
should reject password without number
should return multiple errors for weak password
should validate correct credentials
should reject missing email
should reject invalid email format
should reject missing password
should return multiple errors for invalid credentials

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Complete Authentication Flow
testcase.name: should complete full authentication flow with valid credentials

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Complete Authentication Flow
testcase.name: should handle authentication failure at login step

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Complete Authentication Flow
testcase.name: should handle authentication failure at user details step

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Session Management
testcase.name: should properly format user data for session storage

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Session Management
testcase.name: should handle missing full_name by deriving from email

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Token Handling
testcase.name: should include access token in user details request

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Token Handling
testcase.name: should return both access and refresh tokens

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Token Handling
testcase.name: should handle missing refresh token gracefully

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Error Scenarios Across Components
testcase.name: should handle network timeout gracefully

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Error Scenarios Across Components
testcase.name: should handle malformed JSON response

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Error Scenarios Across Components
testcase.name: should handle backend server unavailable

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Error Scenarios Across Components
testcase.name: should handle 500 server errors with proper error type

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Error Scenarios Across Components
testcase.name: should handle 401 unauthorized with proper error type

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Backend URL Configuration
testcase.name: should use correct backend URL from environment

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Backend URL Configuration
testcase.name: should fall back to default URL when not configured

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Request/Response Flow
testcase.name: should send correct headers in login request

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Request/Response Flow
testcase.name: should send correct body in login request

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Request/Response Flow
testcase.name: should not include credentials in user details request

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Data Validation
testcase.name: should reject empty email

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Data Validation
testcase.name: should reject empty password

testcase.classname: Integration Tests: Authentication Flow › Data Validation
testcase.name: should reject both empty credentials
